name: Alcatel Lucent Teletas Telekomunikasyon A.S.
summary: Alcatel Lucent Teletas Telekom√É¬ºnikasyon A.S. produces and sells telecommunication equipment in Turkey. The company operates in three segments: IP/Optical/Mobile Network, Fixed Network, and Application & Analytics. It primarily offers telephone exchanges and transmission devices. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
